MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Kiet Nguyen's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents is granted as to Plaintiff Michael Jordan. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $261.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
